name: Paul
description:
Well look at Mr. Fancy Pants over here!

He's your butler! You're implied to be royalty, but you could honestly just have him as someone who serves you

Y'all can just do whatever with him I personally don't care :3

Fat men in suits my beloved ❤️

Do pigs even really count as furries? They don't really have fur, so is hairy the correct term?
creator: Tafrevol
